root_cause_category: string; concise root-cause category inferred from export-run and message evidence

share_permissions.user: string; order by user as listed in requirements

enterprise_evidence_audit.target_failed_run_ids: list of target incident failed export-run IDs ordered by run_date ascending
enterprise_evidence_audit.recovery_run_id: first successful target incident run ID after the failure window
enterprise_evidence_audit.quanta_message_ids: list of message IDs sorted ascending that mention Quanta in the full console message history

enterprise_environment_audit.critical_monthly_export_incident_ids: list of Critical monthly_export incident IDs sorted ascending across the full console
enterprise_environment_audit.target_incident_failed_runs: integer failed export-run count for the target incident across the full console
enterprise_environment_audit.other_critical_monthly_export_failed_run: integer failed export-run count for other Critical monthly_export incidents across the full console
enterprise_environment_audit.critical_monthly_export_failed_runs: integer failed export-run count for Critical monthly_export incidents across the full console
